scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:engine && npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:engine && npm run test:web && npm run test:desktop && npm run test:smoke
scripts.verify:hosted-contract: node --check scripts/hosted/hostedAuthSmoke.mjs && node --check scripts/hosted/hostedPairingSmoke.mjs && node --check scripts/web/interactionHarnessSmoke.mjs && node scripts/hosted/hostedAuthSmoke.mjs --contract-only && node scripts/hosted/hostedPairingSmoke.mjs --contract-only && npm run test:smoke && npm run lint:web && npm run test:web && npm run build:web && npm run test:web-interactions && npm run test:desktop
scripts.verify:api: npm run typecheck:api && npm run lint:api && npm run test:api && npm run build:api
